claims.text: A few notable chemistry patterns visible already:

grounded_claims.evidence_snippet: Filler span: no useful database-groundable information.

paragraphs.text:
| Observation | Interpretation |
|---|---|
| Strong coverage for amines, imidazole, ammonia, bipyridyl/phenanthroline | Zn²⁺ is well represented with common **N-donor** ligands |
| Strong coverage for glycine, citrate, IDA, EDTA, HIDA | Also good coverage for **O-donor / aminocarboxylate** ligands |
| Hydroxide, cysteine, penicillamine stand out | SRD-46 includes important **hydrolysis** and **thiolate/sulfur-donor** zinc chemistry |
